steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage presents two contrasting facts about Brâncuşi: he heavily influenced both minimalist and abstract art, yet produced relatively few works due to his exacting standards. The correct answer captures that tension.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• "the themes Brâncuși explored and the themes favored by artists he inspired.": The passage does not meaningfully discuss Brâncuşi's themes or range of subjects. ✗
  • "Brâncuși's importance to the history of art and his total artistic output.": Directly captures the disparity between his outsized influence and small body of work. ✓
  • "the nature of much of Brâncuși's work and the abstraction of *Bird in Space*.": Both are described similarly in the passage; there is no real contrast between them. ✗
  • "Brâncuși's relatively limited productivity and the diversity of his sculptures.": Introduces ideas the passage never raises. ✗
That matches the correct answer — B is correct.
